programmes.show_description: Crime thriller with Fiona Gubelmann. A 911 operator takes a call from a child and dismisses it as a prank. But when a body is discovered, she'll do whatever it takes to make things right (2016).
An uplifting round-up of good news stories from the UK and around the world.
Crime thriller starring Majandra Delfino. A computer security specialist is framed for bank fraud and must join forces with the FBI in a tense race to uncover the truth and clear her name (2009).
Assassins: Sue and her colleagues are assigned to stop a team of mercenaries hired to assassinate a visiting official dignitary.
An uplifting round-up of good news stories from the UK and around the world.

...Bone To Pick: Crime mystery starring Candace Cameron Bure and Lexa Doig. When her friend dies, super sleuth Aurora inherits a house, a hidden skull and a spine-tingling mystery to solve... (2015)
An uplifting round-up of good news stories from the UK and around the world.
...Bone To Pick: Crime mystery starring Candace Cameron Bure and Lexa Doig. When her friend dies, super sleuth Aurora inherits a house, a hidden skull and a spine-tingling mystery to solve... (2015)
With Honor: A murder investigation unearths evidence that suggests Al's former partner may have been a dirty cop. Can Carrie help to protect Al who now finds himself in danger?
Castle, P.I.: Barred from working with Beckett, Castle turns private eye to work 'independently' on the same case as the 12th precinct.
Crime mystery with Pascale Hutton and Kavan Smith. Not much goes on in town without advice columnist Nelly knowing about it. But when her friend is suspected of murder, can she find a killer? (2024)
An uplifting round-up of good news stories from the UK and around the world.
Crime mystery with Pascale Hutton and Kavan Smith. Not much goes on in town without advice columnist Nelly knowing about it. But when her friend is suspected of murder, can she find a killer? (2024)
Murder by the Busload: A busload of potential suspects is revealed after a seemingly tragic road traffic accident becomes a suspected crime scene. Can Dr Sloan and Steve unearth a murderer?
A Candidate for Murder: Dr Sloan investigates the death of a senator's daughter who seemingly died from a drugs overdose. Can he and Amanda discover the truth?
Murder By Twos: Jessica investigates the suspicious deaths of two Cabot Cove locals. Are the deaths linked to an arson attack and a spate of burglaries?
Murder Of The Month Club: Jessica investigates the death of an audience member during the recording of an infomercial.
A Blast From The Past: Can the team protect an agent and his family from an ex-con determined to avenge his imprisonment? Meanwhile, Lucy is on a collision course with a doctor.
Private Eye Caramba!: Beckett investigates the murder of a young Soap Opera star. Meanwhile, PI Castle is also hired to investigate by one of the show's sultry stars.
Friended: Carrie and Al investigate the murder of a party loving heiress. But their investigation is complicated further by a web of lies.
Pilot: Mary Shannon is a Deputy U.S. Marshal for the Federal Witness Security Program - the department responsible for the relocation and protection of state witnesses. Stars Mary McCormack.
...Death: Murder mystery with Alison Sweeney. A true-crime podcaster investigates a death at a self-help retreat. Can she piece together the clues, or will the killer mute her investigation? (2021)
An uplifting round-up of good news stories from the UK and around the world.
...Death: Murder mystery with Alison Sweeney. A true-crime podcaster investigates a death at a self-help retreat. Can she piece together the clues, or will the killer mute her investigation? (2021)
Reap What You Sew: There's a long list of suspects when a family friend is murdered, but can librarian super sleuth Aurora pin down the truth? (2018)
A family's son mysteriously returns home after going missing 10 years ago. However, following two suspicious accidents, doubts begin to mount. Starring Olivia d'Abo. (2018)
An uplifting round-up of good news stories from the UK and around the world.

Pilot: Mary Shannon is a Deputy U.S. Marshal for the Federal Witness Security Program - the department responsible for the relocation and protection of state witnesses. Stars Mary McCormack.
Private Eye Caramba!: Beckett investigates the murder of a young Soap Opera star. Meanwhile, PI Castle is also hired to investigate by one of the show's sultry stars.
...Box Murders: Whodunnit with Lori Loughlin and Sarah Strange. Garage sale guru and amateur sleuth Jennifer comes into possession of an old puzzle that may contain the key to a murder. (2018)
An uplifting round-up of good news stories from the UK and around the world.
...Box Murders: Whodunnit with Lori Loughlin and Sarah Strange. Garage sale guru and amateur sleuth Jennifer comes into possession of an old puzzle that may contain the key to a murder. (2018)
The ABC's of Murder: Dr Sloan helps a lawyer investigate a shooting at a high school. Can they find those responsible for the death of a popular teacher?
Murder in the Family: Dr Sloan is delighted when his daughter, who he hasn't seen for eight-years, visits him at Christmas.
An Egg To Die For: Jessica assists a Russian police officer during a trip to Miami. Can she help him locate a Faberge Egg, stolen from St Petersburg?
The Scent Of Murder: Jessica and Seth travel to South Carolina to visit the doctor's cousin. Will a business deal involving a magnolia tree prove to be a motive for murder?
Silent Night: As she anxiously awaits her parent's arrival for Christmas, a bank robber disguised as Santa Claus keeps Sue and her colleagues busy. Meanwhile, Bobby confronts a news reporter.
I, Witness: Castle is hired by a young woman to see if her husband is cheating on her. But when Castle becomes the only witnesses to her murder, Castle must work to expose the truth.
Road Block: Carrie faces a race against time to find a murderer and the victim's young child. Meanwhile, Carrie receives a potential clue regarding her sister's suspicious death.
Hoosier Daddy: Mary Shannon is a Deputy U.S. Marshal for the Federal Witness Security Program - the department responsible for the relocation and protection of state witnesses.
...A Murder: Whodunnit with Lori Loughlin and Sarah Strange. Antiques expert Jennifer finds an old camera. The photo inside makes her think the last owner's death wasn't an accident. (2018)
An uplifting round-up of good news stories from the UK and around the world.
...A Murder: Whodunnit with Lori Loughlin and Sarah Strange. Antiques expert Jennifer finds an old camera. The photo inside makes her think the last owner's death wasn't an accident. (2018)
...The Disappearing Gam: Crime-solving librarian Aurora is back on the case when students - including her cousin - vanish from a local college. (2018)
